name: MoneyGram
description_short: East Point, GA MoneyGram at 844 Cleveland Ave SW is a 24-hour check-cashing and money transfer location serving the local community.
description_long:
MoneyGram at 844 Cleveland Ave SW in East Point, GA is a standalone check-cashing location open 24 hours daily. This East Point branch on Cleveland Avenue Southwest provides convenient access for residents throughout the area who need financial services at any time—early mornings, late nights, or anytime in between. The location's round-the-clock availability means you don't have to work around traditional banking hours.

At this East Point MoneyGram location, you can cash checks, send domestic and international money transfers, pay bills, and access other essential financial services. The store's extended operating hours accommodate shift workers, travelers, and anyone who needs financial services outside standard business hours. For questions about specific services or transaction details, call +1 404-460-6177.

If you need quick check cashing in East Point, GA, this 24-hour Cleveland Avenue location is designed for fast, straightforward transactions. Bring a valid government-issued ID and your checks—most transactions complete in minutes. MoneyGram provides these essential financial services to help East Point residents and visitors manage their cash flow conveniently.
address: 844 Cleveland Ave SW, East Point, GA 30344

company_info.headquarters: 844 Cleveland Ave SW, East Point, GA 30344

pros: 2,000+ partner locations across 200+ countries and territories provides exceptional accessibility for both senders and receivers
Multiple receiving options (cash pickup, bank deposit, debit card, digital wallet) accommodates diverse recipient preferences and banking situations
Three sending channels (app, website, in-person) gives customers flexibility to transfer money their preferred way
Real-time transfer tracking from initiation through completion provides transparency and peace of mind
High customer satisfaction ratings (4.9 stars App Store, 4.6 Google Play) with hundreds of thousands of reviews
Strong international coverage with particularly robust networks in major remittance corridors (Mexico, Philippines, El Salvador)
Emphasizes competitive exchange rates and low transfer fees as core differentiators
cons: Exchange rates and fees are not transparently listed on the website—customers must initiate a transfer or contact support to see specific costs for their corridor
Requires account creation and profile setup before sending, adding friction compared to some cash-based competitors
Website does not clearly specify delivery timeframes (same-day vs. multi-day) by destination country or sending method
Limited detail on security certifications or regulatory oversight beyond generic mentions of 'advanced security and encryption'
Customer testimonials are cherry-picked without independent verification or third-party review aggregation beyond app store ratings
best_for: Individuals sending remittances to family in Mexico, Central America, Philippines, and other developing nations
People who prefer multiple options for how they send (digital or in-person) and want flexibility in how recipients receive funds
Customers prioritizing established brand reputation and extensive partner accessibility over finding the absolute lowest fees
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for customers sending international remittances who value accessibility and multiple sending/receiving options over shopping purely for the lowest fees. The main caveat is that advertised exchange rates and fees are not transparently published online—customers must generate a specific quote for their intended transfer corridor to understand actual costs.
services: International money transfers to 200+ countries and territories
In-person cash sending at partner locations
Cash pickup at partner locations for recipients
Direct bank account deposit for recipients
Money transfer to both individuals and multiple recipients
meta_description: MoneyGram at 844 Cleveland Ave SW, East Point, GA. 24-hour check cashing and money transfer services.
